response_parsed.reasoning: The call revolves around a technical support issue regarding degraded backup performance experienced by Kendra's retail company. David from Aegis Cloud Security identifies a potential root cause related to the backup agent version being outdated, which has known performance issues. The conversation also highlights a lack of communication regarding the update, leading to customer frustration and a need for escalation if the issue persists after the proposed upgrade.
evidence_quotes: our nightly backup jobs are taking, uh, somewhere between four and six hours to complete
there was a known issue in 3.4.x where under certain conditions the change block tracking mechanism could — um — essentially over-scan
if you're still seeing the issue after the upgrade, the next thing I'd want to look at is your network egress path
